name: B.E. Lending
description_short: B.E. Lending provides private money loans for real estate investors and fix-and-flip projects, offering fast funding for time-sensitive deals when traditional financing isn't available.
description_long:
B.E. Lending is a Phoenix-based private money lender specializing in real estate financing for investors, house flippers, and developers. The company operates as a vertically integrated lender, meaning it handles all capital, underwriting, and loan servicing in-house to streamline the approval and funding process. Based on their website, they have funded over $0M in real estate loans across numerous transactions, serving a nationwide coverage area from their corporate headquarters in Phoenix, Arizona.

The company offers private money loans designed for time-sensitive real estate transactions, particularly projects that fall outside traditional bank lending criteria. Their loan products cater to real estate investors needing quick capital for acquisitions, renovations, and fix-and-flip projects. B.E. Lending emphasizes their ability to handle expedited closings, including same-day or 24-hour auction deals. They also provide loan servicing for existing borrowers, including draw requests and payoff management.

B.E. Lending differentiates itself through relationship-focused lending and creative deal structuring. They emphasize identifying potential hurdles in transactions that could impact borrowers' returns and claim to prioritize partnerships over transactional relationships. Client testimonials highlight fast closings, reliable communication, and team members who go beyond standard expectations. The company specifically markets its ability to serve borrowers who cannot qualify for conventional financing.

However, prospective borrowers should note that the website lacks specific information about interest rates, loan terms, fees, minimum/maximum loan amounts, and credit requirements. As a private money lender, B.E. Lending's rates will typically be higher than traditional mortgages. The website contains placeholder statistics (showing $0M funded), which raises questions about the accuracy of published claims. Their lending focus is explicitly on real estate investment and commercial deals rather than primary residence purchases.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Vertically integrated operations enabling faster underwriting and funding decisions
Specialized in expedited closings, including 24-hour auction deal financing
Nationwide coverage area, not limited to Arizona
In-house loan servicing for draws and payoffs, eliminating third-party delays
Creative deal structuring with willingness to explore non-standard solutions
Team members specifically named in testimonials, suggesting accountability and personalized service
Experience with borrowers rejected by traditional lenders
cons: No published interest rates, fees, or loan term specifics on website
No information about minimum/maximum loan amounts or credit requirements
Placeholder statistics ($0M funded) undermine credibility of claimed lending volume
Limited to real estate investment deals; not for primary residence purchases
Private money lending inherently carries higher costs than traditional mortgages
best_for: Real estate investors needing quick capital for fix-and-flip projects
Developers and house flippers with time-sensitive auction or closing deadlines
Borrowers with non-traditional credit or income profiles unable to qualify for traditional mortgages
Experienced real estate professionals executing multiple transactions per year
diagnosis: B.E. Lending is designed for real estate investors and professional flippers who need fast, flexible financing outside traditional banking channels. The primary caveat is that as a private money lender, their cost of capital will be substantially higher than conventional mortgages, making them suitable only for short-term investment projects where quick access to funds justifies premium rates.
services: Private money loans for real estate acquisitions
Transaction opportunity identification and risk analysis
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
